author: maxine--futura
content: Result: Migration complete. 877 chainlink issues processed: 16 open issues deduplicated to 10 crosslink issues (#2-#11), 861 closed/archived issues preserved in .chainlink.bak/issues.db and git history. 3 knowledge pages created: development-history (full arc summary), architecture-decisions (8 key decisions), open-work-context (technical notes for active work streams). Hub sync working, agent trust configured.
